name: Tajik Autonomous Soviet Socialist Republic (1929)
description: A red field with the state coat of arms of the autonomous republic in the upper-hoist (top-left) corner.
history: The first specifically Tajik flag, adopted on 23 February 1929 for the newly created Tajik Autonomous SSR (autonomous within the Uzbek SSR). It was a stopgap red flag bearing the coat of arms in the top-left corner, replaced in April 1929 by a flag with the formalised state emblem.

features.role: coat of arms of the Tajik ASSR
features.symbolism: the arms of the autonomous republic
